decision.reasoning: Mean reversion thesis intact - RSI even more oversold (21.5 vs 22.3 at entry). Movement is sector-wide (LVMH -1.37%), not Hermès-specific. Within normal volatility range (2.13% avg). US market positive (+0.75%). Recommend waiting for US close (21h UTC) before reassessing.
conditions_for_action: If close < €1600 (-4.2% from entry): Re-evaluate mean reversion thesis
If sector continues weakening tomorrow: Consider risk reduction
